---
title: AI-Driven Predictive Analytics for Business Growth Using R
subtitle: Real Estate Market Intelligence in Nigeria
author: Ghana R Conference 2026 Workshop
output-file: stakeholder_report.html
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

source("R/report_helpers.R")
report_artifacts <- load_report_artifacts()
```

## Executive Summary {#sec-executive-summary}

{{< include /qmd/_01_executive_summary.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

## Business and Data Soundness {#sec-business-data-soundness}

{{< include /qmd/_02_business_data_soundness.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

## Model Development and Performance {#sec-model-performance}

{{< include /qmd/_03_model_performance.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

## Business Screening and Governance {#sec-business-governance}

{{< include /qmd/_04_business_governance.qmd >}}
